payload.reason: Record readonly result-review capability evidence for R20.

policy.name: autoform_result_query_capabilities
policy.purpose: 列出结果审阅变量、视角、路线和证据边界。

result.evidence_boundary: Variable and task mappings are grounded in the plan document evidence IDs. AutoForm R13 bottom animation playback controls now have local AutoComp_R13 evidence; V1.1 stable demos use verified view shortcuts plus the confirmed guarded AutoComp_R13 playback profile. Toolbar fit-window automation, direct reset discovery, exact frame-count reading, and generalized automatic click execution are V1.2 or later tasks because they depend on UI layout details.

recovery_guides.check: Run autoform_gui_window_snapshot before any click or screenshot action.
recovery_guides.condition: No visible AutoForm result window is found.
recovery_guides.next_step: Open the latest result project, then repeat the window snapshot.

recovery_guides.check: Compare the selected .afd path with the window title and the latest run_manifest.json.
recovery_guides.condition: A window exists but the requested result project is not confirmed.
recovery_guides.next_step: Reopen the selected project with autoform_result_open_project and capture evidence.

recovery_guides.check: Capture a screenshot and record the dialog title before continuing.
recovery_guides.condition: A license, warning, or modal dialog blocks the result area.
recovery_guides.next_step: Return the dialog evidence to the user and wait for explicit instruction.

recovery_guides.check: Return the semantic route, presenter evidence, and screenshot plan without clicking unknown controls.
recovery_guides.condition: The requested result variable, view, or animation button has no verified R13 control path.
recovery_guides.next_step: Collect GUI screenshots and stable control coordinates before enabling automatic execution.

recovery_guides.check: Record window rectangle, monitor origin, and screenshot size with every evidence capture.
recovery_guides.condition: DPI, resolution, or monitor layout changes the relative click target.
recovery_guides.next_step: Use a fresh window snapshot and avoid replaying stale coordinates.
